title: [PDF] The French Monarchy and the Jews by William Chester Jordan | 9780812281750, 9781512805321
highlights:
From 1179 to 1328 relations between French Christians and Jews were chronically unstable—exploitation, repression, and expulsion were sanctioned by a government dedicated to a purified Christian state. The French Monarchy and the Jews tells in rich and compelling detail the fate of the Jews in Capetian France.William Chester Jordan assesses the  ...    ## Information
